step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a cream ribbed seamless cropped tank with built-in shelf bra and matching cream high-waist seamless leggings, small gold huggie earrings, a thin gold pendant necklace, hair down in soft natural waves with a center part, bare feet, clean neutral nails. She stands in a premium pilates studio facing a tall floor-to-ceiling mirror, sage-green reformer machine behind her, warm marble floor, exposed brick side wall, a tall window on her left letting in late-afternoon sun. Standing facing the mirror, weight on her left leg, right knee slightly bent, posture upright with a soft confident smile. Her right hand is raised at face level holding a phone capturing the mirror reflection. Her left hand is at chest level, palm angled slightly toward the mirror, fingers in a relaxed open position, currently empty. Soft warm natural daylight pours through the tall window on her left, late afternoon, warm bone tones across the marble floor, gentle warm rim on her left side. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro front camera. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Post-class composed polished mood, palette of cream, beige, sage green, warm marble bone. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: Left hand at chest level, thumb pressed flat on the front face of the box, four fingers wrapping the back edge, box held perpendicular to her body so the front face points directly at the mirror.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box into her left hand at chest level, oriented so the front face of the box points directly at the mirror — the mirror reflection visible in the frame must show the box's front face clearly readable. The right hand continues to hold the phone unchanged.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — medium full mid-thigh-up framing where face is one of several elements alongside the mirror reflection, phone, and reformer; default sufficient with the verbatim face descriptor and strong identity-lock instruction.
